Once upon a strange town, there lived an owl named Oliver. Oliver found life peculiar—full moonlit wanderlust.

Each night, Oliver flew far into the sleepy countryside—nighttime adventures sprinkled with whispers.

There lay Elmwood Gardens—a tranquil maze filled with autumn jewels. Oliver loved nocturnal ballet there.
